title: [L530] Divine Gifts
description: This Palladium addon introduces three unique religions for players to align with in the world of Landfall-530. Each religion offers thematic powers, compelling lore, and immersive experiences.
body:
# This mod is primarily designed for the Landfall SMP and contains many assets we rely on. It may not work well outside this intended envrionment.

### Overview:

This addon introduces a bunch of elements that are used by the Landfall SMP. Primarily, custom items and three unique religions for players to align with in the world of Landfall-530. Each religion offers thematic powers, compelling lore, and immersive experiences. Players can deepen their roleplay and connect with their deities while maintaining balance through non-gamebreaking abilities. There is an additional locked power for all religions that is enabled for a player through the "devotion" objective.

Also included:
- The Divine Entity "admin" superpower so they may embody the gods
- Prefix font for bloodlines within Landfall-530
- Additional fuel types with a super involved crafting process.

----
### 1. Conclave of the Silent Forge

Deities: Volkar, The Silent Smith & Kaelix, The Warden of Ash

Lore:
The Conclave follows Volkar and Kaelix, gods of creation and destruction. Volkar silently forges life and matter, while Kaelix governs the cycle of renewal by overseeing destruction. The Conclave believes that creation requires destruction, and they honor both deities through crafting and offering spent materials to be reforged in the eternal fires.

----
### 2. The Umbral Communion

Deity: Nethrys, The Shadowed One

Lore:
The followers of Nethrys believe in balance, embracing both light and shadow as intertwined forces. Nethrys, draped in a cloak of living shadow, grants her followers insight into the mysteries of the unseen. The Umbral Communion seeks to maintain equilibrium in the world, subtly guiding events from the shadows.

----
### 3. Weavers of the Verdant Thread

Deity: Sylhara, The Eternal Loom

Lore:
Sylhara weaves all life into a grand tapestry, connecting all living things. The Weavers devote themselves to understanding this network and maintaining the balance of nature. They guide the flow of life energy, ensuring harmony between the natural world and civilization.
